overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through a misty meadow and forest. The character passes wooden gallows with hanging bodies before continuing into a more wooded area with fences and rocky terrain.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through the meadow, two swords visible on his back, approaching distant structures

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
tall grass with white and yellow wildflowers
tall grass with white and yellow wildflowers
white-barked deciduous trees scattered on the left hillside
dark evergreen trees on the right slope
wooden execution structures visible in the misty distance
dense tree line marking the horizon under a cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through an open meadow bathed in warm morning light. Wildflowers line both sides of the trail while birch and pine trees dot the landscape. In the distance, wooden gallows structures are visible through the atmospheric mist.

events.description: passing the wooden gallows with hanging bodies lining the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past the grim wooden gallows structures, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: corpse suspended from the gallows rope swaying slightly

segments.scene_description: The path leads past imposing wooden gallows structures that dominate the right side of the frame. A hanging body becomes clearly visible as Geralt approaches and passes the execution site. The meadow recedes into the background as the character moves through this grim landmark.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded trail with fence and rocky outcrops

events.description: path becomes more enclosed with wooden fence appearing on the left side

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the narrowing forest path, passing wooden fences and rocky terrain on the right

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence lining the left side of the path
large moss-covered rock formation emerging from the vegetation
thick trees creating a canopy overhead
thick trees creating a canopy overhead

segments.scene_description: Leaving the gallows behind, the path enters a more enclosed forested area. A wooden fence appears on the left while rocky outcrops emerge on the right. The vegetation becomes denser and the lighting more dappled as the trees close in around the trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit meadow that gradually transitions into a grim execution site and finally a dense, enclosed forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a winding dirt path lined with wildflowers and scattered birch trees under warm morning light. As the camera advances, the open landscape gives way to imposing wooden gallows where a hanging body becomes visible, casting a somber mood over the trail. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the execution site behind, moving into a more secluded area where the path is flanked by a wooden fence and rocky outcrops. Finally, the vegetation thickens and the lighting becomes dappled as the trees close in, fully enveloping the trail in a wooded environment.
